text: This state is characterized by failure or delay in the natural detachment of the prepuce from the glans penis.  The biological compartment this is measured in is the glans penis, glans-prepuce adhesion interface, and preputial epithelium.  Normal preputial separation serves protective, mechanical, immunological and erogenous functions (Paraboschi and Garriboli 2020).  Biological consequences of a failure in this separation fall into the same areas.
